title: 1mg Capital India is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Senior)

jsonLd.title: 1mg Capital India is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at 1mg Capital India. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Full Stack Developer to strengthen our Coimbatore-based team.

About 1mg Capital India:
1mg Capital India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in TensorFlow

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Life and accident insurance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with 1mg Capital India!
